\tzpentry{ID4769}{Reassembled Quantum Chemical Potential Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4769 introduces Reassembled Quantum Chemical Potential Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tP = \\int_{\\mathcal{S}} (T^{\\mu\\nu}u_{\\nu}) \\cdot d\\vec{A} \\implies P_{\\text{max}} \\sim \\frac{\\hbar c^2}{a^2}\n\\end{equation}
